brief_notes: Solid baseline with 7 tables preserving key v3 statistics (AUC 0.964->0.986, Cohen's d 0.88, IQRs). Table audit PASS. However, tables are very sparse with excessive N/A cells showing only top performers, gene expression table collapses per-model values into a range, and citations are minimal (only ~6 inline). Discussion lacks structural depth compared to the extraction's richness.
